candidate_definition_hints.text: Cornell NLVR and NLVR2 are natural language grounding datasets. Each example shows a visual input and a sentence describing it, and is annotated with the truth-value of the sentence.

This repository contains data for [NLVR](https://github.com/clic-lab/nlvr/tree/master/nlvr) (Suhr et al. 2017) and [NLVR2](https://github.com/clic-lab/nlvr/tree/master/nlvr2) (Suhr and Zhou et al. 2018).
